heading_content_part: Mashi Internet Technology Limitedknows the importance of your personal information. We will protect your personal information and privacy in accordance with regulations and laws. To explain how Mashi collects, uses, and stores your personal information and what rights you have, we have formulated this privacy policy with special reminders: we hope you can read and understand this privacy policy carefully before using Mashi and its related services so that you can make appropriate choices. This policy is an integral part of the

decoder_heading: Mashi Internet Technology Limited

heading_content_part: We will collect and use your information in accordance with this privacy policy. Still, we will not collect your personal information in a mandatory way as you have agreed to this privacy policy. When you enable related functions or use services, we will collect and use your relevant information to realize these functions and services. You can refuse to provide any personal information without affecting any function or service. However, the information will still be collected to achieve essential business functions or needed in accordance with the requirements of regulations and laws.

Please pay special attention to them.

It will also help us provide you with the dating service and more personalized services and content. The above information we mentioned is sensitive. You can turn off the relevant function at any time and clear the above information.
